dashboard.title: Everything you need is on this one screen
dashboard.subtitle: Technical details are hidden. Read the action needed first, then recent work and big goals.
dashboard.today_biggest_label: Biggest thing the robot did today
dashboard.pr_check_label: Do I need to look at PRs?
dashboard.not_your_problem: 🧘 Things you don't have to worry about
dashboard.dad_sessions_hint: Recent Codex↔Claude peer conversations. "Converged" means both agreed; "Active" means still going. Operator doesn't need to do anything here.
dashboard.glossary_hint: Just look here if a term is unfamiliar.
dashboard.empty_manager_actions: Nothing for the operator to do right now.

runner.halt_detected: 🛑 HALT detected — waiting for operator to resume.
runner.finished_wait: 🏁 Iter finished. Waiting for next paste.

glossary.meaning: A checklist for whether the game/product is actually playable/usable. Not the operator's job — it's the robot's next big task.
A change bundle the robot opened. Only look when the dashboard says "PR check needed".
A flag showing the robot is currently running. Dead locks are cleaned up automatically on start.
Removing old branches or scratch artifacts. Usually not the operator's job.
